description: Phase 31: QuantPay - Payments & Financial Services App. Create apps/quantpay/ with P2P transfers, QR payments, split bills, subscription management, multi-currency support, virtual cards, merchant tools, and integration hooks for tipping/paid features across ecosystem.
steps: Create apps/quantpay/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/payments (workspace:*), fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantpay/tsconfig.json extending root with references to packages used.
Create apps/quantpay/backend/app.ts following quantmeet pattern - createApp from @quant/server-core, register routes for transfers, wallets, merchants, cards
Create apps/quantpay/backend/services/transfer.service.ts - P2PTransferService class: sendMoney, requestMoney, splitBill, getTransferHistory, cancelTransfer. Zod schemas for inputs.
Create apps/quantpay/backend/services/wallet.service.ts - WalletService class: createWallet, getBalance, addFunds, withdrawFunds, getTransactionHistory, multi-currency support with exchange rates
Create apps/quantpay/backend/services/merchant.service.ts - MerchantService class: registerMerchant, createInvoice, generateQRCode, processPayment, getMerchantAnalytics, refundPayment
Create apps/quantpay/backend/services/card.service.ts - VirtualCardService class: issueCard, freezeCard, setSpendingLimits, getCardTransactions, categorizeTransaction
Create apps/quantpay/backend/services/subscription.service.ts - SubscriptionManagementService: createPlan, subscribeToPlan, cancelSubscription, upgradePlan, getBillingHistory
Create apps/quantpay/backend/routes/transfers.ts, routes/wallets.ts, routes/merchants.ts, routes/cards.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantpay/backend/__tests__/transfer.service.test.ts - Tests for P2P transfers, split bills, request money
Create apps/quantpay/backend/__tests__/wallet.service.test.ts - Tests for wallet operations, multi-currency, balance checks
Create apps/quantpay/backend/__tests__/merchant.service.test.ts - Tests for merchant registration, QR payments, invoicing
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantpay/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
app.ts creates a Fastify app using @quant/server-core createApp pattern
P2PTransferService handles money transfers with validation and history
WalletService supports multi-currency with exchange rate conversion
MerchantService provides POS integration with QR code generation
VirtualCardService manages card lifecycle with spending limits
All services use zod schemas for input validation
Unit tests pass for transfer, wallet, and merchant services
pnpm typecheck passes for the app
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantpay/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
